title: Biomes of Overworld
description: This mod adds new biomes to the overworld adds new ores and items enjoy this mod
body:
⚠️ **Are you using Prism, ATLauncher, or CurseForge?** 
Downloading updates directly through external launchers completely cuts off our developer ad payout. If you love the new biomes and armor sets, please download our updates through the official web browser or the [Modrinth Desktop App](https://modrinth.com) to support the project!

***

# 🌍 Biomes of Overworld

Biomes of Overworld expands Minecraft's world generation with new biomes, mobs, ores, structures, and challenges to discover.

### ✨ Features:
* **15 Custom Biomes**: Explore unique terrain including the Volcano, Maple Forest, Prehistoric Biome, Frozen Shore, and North Pole.
* **8 New Mobs**: Discover unique creatures inhabiting the new biomes.
* **4 New Ores & Armor Sets**: Mine rare resources and craft powerful new gear.
* **2 Custom Villager Professions**: Trade for rare items with specialized villagers featuring unique trades.
* **New Decorative Blocks**: Expand your building palette with new regional blocks.
* **Unique Structures**: Uncover hidden dungeons and structures across the world.
* **Custom Boss Fight**: Test your skills in a dedicated boss biome.

This mod is actively developed for NeoForge and receives frequent updates. Explore new lands, gather rare resources, craft powerful equipment, and take on new challenges across the Overworld.
